title: Stop email signatures saving as images in updates
excerpt: When updates are made via email, the images in the signatures are saved multiple times such as facebook, instagram and linkedin icons. Is there any way to disable images being saved automatically when an update is sent t…

posts.author: tiagarmonsway (Tia Garmonsway)
posts.cookedHtml: When updates are made via email, the images in the signatures are saved multiple times such as facebook, instagram and linkedin icons. Is there any way to disable images being saved automatically when an update is sent this way?

posts.author: Janeen (Janeen Baker)
posts.cookedHtml: any feedback on this issue? it’s a big problem for my team.
